summary: Frontend-only test of Phase 3 Batch 1 (Parts 1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 11). 6 of 7 parts PASS at runtime; PART 5 (public legal pages) FAILS at runtime due to a URL routing mismatch — App.js registers /privacy, /terms, /cookies but the spec (and the admin Legal preview button) expect /privacy-policy, /terms-of-service, /cookie-policy. PART 1 stats bar + calendar code-reviewed only (seeded user has no active site, which correctly renders only the welcome banner — runtime path verified). Maintenance overlay, admin Legal 3-tab editor, sidebar Legal item, live recipient count, and AI-Writer removal all work as specified.

minor.issue: Console shows two 405 errors when /adminpanel/legal first mounts (likely the GET /api/admin/legal/{slug} read endpoint returning 405). Editor still renders with empty title/content — graceful degradation per agent_to_agent_context_note. Saving has not been verified end-to-end but UI is wired correctly via adminLegalApi.update.

ui_bugs.component: App.js routes + LegalPages.jsx + admin Legal preview
ui_bugs.issue: Public legal pages cannot be reached at /privacy-policy, /terms-of-service, /cookie-policy. App.js registers them as /privacy, /terms, /cookies (lines 114-116), so navigating to /privacy-policy hits the catch-all '*' → Navigate to '/' and the [data-testid={slug}-page] element never renders. The admin Legal preview button (Legal.jsx line 74) opens `/${slug}` which yields /privacy-policy etc. — that link is broken too. Spec PART 5 explicitly requires /privacy-policy, /terms-of-service, /cookie-policy. Fix: change App.js routes to the long slugs (preferred — matches spec + admin preview) OR add additional aliases. The LegalPages component already uses the long-slug testids, so only the App.js Route paths need updating.

verified_pass: PART 1 (welcome banner branch — no active site): /dashboard renders [data-testid=user-dashboard-home] + [data-testid=welcome-banner] only; NO [data-testid=dashboard-stats-bar] and NO [data-testid=content-calendar] (matches spec).

PART 1 (stats + calendar branch — code review): When activeSite is present, DashboardHome.jsx (lines 376-487) renders dashboard-stats-bar with stat-total-words / stat-cost-savings / stat-time-saved / stat-articles-published, then content-calendar with calendar-month-label, calendar-prev-month, calendar-next-month, calendar-grid (grid-cols-7), calendar-add-terms-btn. Month navigation handlers wrap year boundaries correctly.

PART 1 (plugin update banner — code review): Banner gated on overview.pluginUpdate.available && !dismissed; close button calls userApi.dismissPluginBanner({version}). Properly hidden when overview is null. Cannot exercise at runtime because seeded user has no active site → no overview fetch.

PART 2: /dashboard/ai-writer is NOT a registered route — visiting it falls through to the catch-all and redirects to / (homepage). App.js no longer imports WritePage. Sidebar does NOT contain an AI Writer item (the 'Auto Article Writing' entry points to /dashboard/auto-publish which is PublishPage, not the removed WritePage).

PART 4: /adminpanel/legal renders [data-testid=admin-legal-page] with all three tabs [data-testid=legal-tab-privacy-policy], [data-testid=legal-tab-terms-of-service], [data-testid=legal-tab-cookie-policy]. Default-active tab Privacy renders [data-testid=legal-editor-privacy-policy], [data-testid=legal-title-input-privacy-policy], [data-testid=legal-content-input-privacy-policy] (textarea), [data-testid=legal-save-privacy-policy], [data-testid=legal-preview-privacy-policy], [data-testid=legal-last-updated-privacy-policy]. NOTE: spec uses 'admin-seo-jalwa' as a placeholder string for the slug — actual testids correctly use the per-slug suffix.

PART 6: Dispatching window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('jalwa:maintenance-mode', {detail:{message:'test maintenance'}})) on a non-admin page mounts [data-testid=maintenance-overlay] with [data-testid=maintenance-message]='test maintenance' and [data-testid=maintenance-retry-btn]. MaintenanceListener.jsx correctly skips /adminpanel paths.

PART 7: /adminpanel/announcements shows [data-testid=announcement-recipient-count] with [data-testid=announcement-recipient-count-value]='3' (live from backend, NO hardcoded 2,847 anywhere in the live count area). Switching Target Audience from 'All users' to 'Free users' refetches and changes the count to '1' — proves it is live. [data-testid=send-announcement-btn] is wired to adminApi.sendAnnouncement with subject + message + targetAudience + channel and shows 'Sent to X users successfully' toast.

PART 11: Admin sidebar (Sidebar.jsx) contains a 'Legal Pages' item at the correct position between Blog and Announcements, with [data-testid=sidebar-nav-legal-pages]. Clicking it navigates to /adminpanel/legal and renders the page.
action_items: HIGH — Fix public legal page URLs. Change App.js lines 114-116 from /privacy, /terms, /cookies to /privacy-policy, /terms-of-service, /cookie-policy (and optionally keep the short ones as alias <Navigate> redirects). This unblocks (a) the spec PART 5 testids that already exist in LegalPages.jsx, and (b) the admin Legal preview button which opens `/${slug}`.
MEDIUM (untestable for fresh seeded users) — Seed at least one user with an active connected site so PART 1 stats bar + calendar runtime path can be exercised by the next testing agent.

LOW — Investigate the two 405 errors on /adminpanel/legal load (likely GET /api/admin/legal/{slug}). Per agent_to_agent_context_note frontend handles 4xx gracefully, but the editor currently always opens with empty fields because of these failures.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin Legal preview button (Legal.jsx line 74) builds `/${slug}` directly. Since the admin Legal slugs are 'privacy-policy', 'terms-of-service', 'cookie-policy', this only works if App.js exposes those exact public routes. Currently broken — fix the App.js routes (preferred) rather than the preview path.

DashboardHome.jsx stats fallback (lines 215-220) computes costSavings + timeSaved client-side as Math.round((totalWords / 1000) * 50) and *2 when the API doesn't return them. Good defensive default, but values look odd ($50 per 1k words, 2 hours per 1k words) — confirm these match the marketing copy used elsewhere on the site.

MaintenanceListener.jsx (line 17) reads window.location.pathname.startsWith('/adminpanel') inside the event handler — correct, evaluated at dispatch time so admin users hitting maintenance on a non-admin page they navigated to will still see it. Good behaviour.

Announcements.jsx switches recipientCount to null + countLoading=true on every audience change (lines 54-56) → the [data-testid=announcement-recipient-count-value] briefly disappears while loading. Spec says 'NO hardcoded 2847 fallback in the live count area' — confirmed. Em-dash fallback when count is null is acceptable.

AuthRedirect (App.js lines 75-89) now honours localStorage 'jalwa_post_signup_redirect' — this is the fix for iteration 18's HIGH bug #2 (signup → /dashboard race). Looks correct, but I did not re-exercise the /signup → /onboarding/select-plan flow this run; main agent should self-test that the new localStorage flag is set by SignupPage on success.

Sidebar.jsx data-testid uses .toLowerCase().replace(' ', '-') — note this only replaces the FIRST space. 'Email Templates' → 'email-templates' works because there's only one space, but 'AI Insights' → 'ai-insights' fine, 'API Keys' → 'api-keys' fine. Safe today but brittle for any future 3-word menu name — use replace(/ /g,'-').

success_rate.frontend: 6/7 parts PASS, 1/7 (PART 5 public legal URLs) FAIL with HIGH-priority route mismatch. PART 1 stats/calendar code-verified only (no seeded user with active site).

test_credentials: Used existing seeded user testuser_1779443689@jalwa.com / TestPassword123! and admin jalwa / jalwaisadmin. Both still valid.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After E1 fixes the App.js public legal route paths to /privacy-policy, /terms-of-service, /cookie-policy, re-run PART 5: navigate to each URL, verify [data-testid={slug}-page] and [data-testid=legal-content] + [data-testid=legal-last-updated] render, and verify the admin Legal preview button (PART 4) opens the now-working public page. PART 1 stats bar + content calendar runtime is still gated on a user with an active site — request a seeded user with a connected WP site for the next iteration. Iteration 18's two HIGH bugs (SelectPlanPage slug testids + signup→plan-selection race) appear to have been addressed by the new AuthRedirect localStorage flag pattern but were NOT re-exercised this run.
rca_of_the_issue: Public legal pages PART 5: App.js declares routes /privacy, /terms, /cookies (LegalPages component already emits the spec testids privacy-policy-page / terms-of-service-page / cookie-policy-page). Visiting /privacy-policy etc. hits the catch-all '*' → Navigate to '/'. Three pages of behaviour-correct UI code is unreachable from the URLs the spec + admin preview button use. Fix is a one-line-per-route change in App.js. The admin Legal preview button (Legal.jsx line 74 — window.open(`/${slug}`)) is the canonical user flow into these pages, so changing the routes is preferable to changing the slugs.
